nodes.label: Compute phase+action for backtest engine. Uses centralised logic.py.

nodes.label: Pair-based backtest: BUY signal opens position, SELL signal closes it.     Entr
nodes.norm_label: pair-based backtest: buy signal opens position, sell signal closes it.     entr

nodes.label: SRI — SM Relative Intensity Metric
nodes.rationale: Measures how aggressive Smart Money is today vs its 10-day historical average. Used to normalize SM activity relative to its own baseline rather than absolute values.

nodes.label: RPR — Rasio Tekanan Jual Metric
nodes.rationale: BM = big players selling, not retail participation. RPR > 0.6 triggers UPTHRUST. Corrected from earlier misname as 'retail participation ratio'.

nodes.label: MES — Market Efficiency Score Metric
nodes.rationale: Low MES + high SRI = stealth accumulation (price flat despite heavy SM buying).

nodes.label: ATR% — Average True Range Metric
nodes.rationale: Per-stock volatility normalization. 3% gain in BBCA (3x ATR) is very different from 3% in PADI (<1x ATR). Without ATR both are detected the same.

nodes.label: Phase Classification Algorithm v2
nodes.rationale: ATR-dynamic thresholds make phase detection stock-specific. Decision tree order matters — first matching phase wins.

nodes.label: Backtest Engine v2 — Multi-Entry Pair-Based
nodes.rationale: Multi-entry: every BUY opens new position, SELL closes all simultaneously. Entry at OPEN of next day (realistic: trader sees signal at night, buys next morning). Replaced single-entry backtest.

nodes.label: Profit Factor Metric
nodes.rationale: Replaced Expectancy because PF is more intuitive: for every Rp1 lost, how much Rp is gained?

nodes.label: RSM — SM Ratio Percentage
nodes.rationale: Size-agnostic: 65% for BBRI (trillions) and small cap (millions) means the same. System doesn't care about absolute money size, only SM vs BM dominance.

nodes.label: VWAP SM — Volume-Weighted Average SM Buy Price
nodes.norm_label: vwap sm — volume-weighted average sm buy price

nodes.label: VWAP BM — Volume-Weighted Average BM Sell Price
nodes.norm_label: vwap bm — volume-weighted average bm sell price

nodes.label: Phase Classification Algorithm v2.1
nodes.rationale: v2.1 changes: DISTRI drops SRI requirement (blind spot fix), ABSORB priority raised above SPRING, DISTRI fallback uses RPR instead of SRI.

nodes.label: Phase Classification Algorithm v3.0
nodes.rationale: Adds Capital Preservation focus. SOS expanded with OR clause. Supply Gate (Gate A) and ARB Safety (Gate B) and Global Anti-Pucuk (Gate C) added to action system.

nodes.label: logic.py — Single Source of Truth v3.1
nodes.rationale: Centralized phase logic to eliminate 3 duplicate implementations in app.py, scraper_daily.py (classify), scraper_daily.py (backtest). DRY architecture.
nodes.norm_label: logic.py — single source of truth v3.1

nodes.label: ARB_SPRING Watch Flag
nodes.rationale: SPRING with extreme drop (>1.5x ATR) near Auto Rejection Bawah. Action stays HOLD, frontend displays WATCH label. Avoids creating new action string that would break existing code.

nodes.label: Supply Gate — Gate A
nodes.rationale: bm_val > bm_sma10 * 3.0 = massive sell wall. Returns HOLD to protect SM momentum from being stopped.

nodes.label: Global Anti-Pucuk Gate — Gate C
nodes.rationale: Applied to ALL BUY phases in v3.1 (was only SOS in v2.1). Prevents FOMO/HAKA on all phases when pchg >= th_sos_h.

nodes.label: BM_SMA10 — Baseline Bad Money Simple Mean
nodes.rationale: Simple mean (not trimmed) for BM because it is used as activity gate. Realistic baseline including quiet days.
nodes.norm_label: bm_sma10 — baseline bad money simple mean

nodes.label: SRI Trimmed Mean Computation v3.1
nodes.rationale: Drop 1 highest value from 10-day window to eliminate big-event outliers (rights issue, RUPS, rumors) that would artificially suppress subsequent SRI values.

nodes.label: Dry Spell Window History Cutoff
nodes.rationale: ~20 trading days = ~28 calendar day cutoff on history queries. Prevents stale data from months ago distorting SRI and bm_sma10 for stocks that haven't appeared in Joker recently.

nodes.label: Signal Queue Pattern — Critical Architecture
nodes.rationale: Long-running ops must run in scraper thread, not HTTP handlers. Gunicorn 30s timeout kills HTTP handlers. SQLite locks if two threads write simultaneously.

nodes.label: Database Schema v3 — raw_messages, eod_summary, backtest_cache
nodes.norm_label: database schema v3 — raw_messages, eod_summary, backtest_cache

nodes.label: Zenith UI Design System — Dark Terminal Aesthetic
nodes.rationale: Colors, fonts, and CSS variables are identity — must not change. Space Mono for data/nav, DM Sans for body.
nodes.norm_label: zenith ui design system — dark terminal aesthetic

nodes.label: Bandarmologi Methodology
nodes.rationale: Tracking institutional/big player (bandar) activity on IDX to detect accumulation and distribution phases. Wyckoff-inspired but adapted for Indonesian market.
